description: Prosecution seat of the adversarial (dialectic) PR review (#1222): builds the strongest evidenced case that a change introduces defects, with the repository checked out and read/search/exec tools. Licensed to over-flag — a separate defense rebuts and a separate judge rules, so precision pressure is lifted off this seat by design. Emits freeform numbered CHARGE marker blocks (deliberately no output_schema: a grammar-constrained output combined with tools makes the model skip tool-calling and fabricate, verified 2026-07-04).

feedback_templates.cycle_suspected: [darkmux-runtime] You've called `{tool_name}` {count} times in {window_size} turns with the same arguments. You have examined enough — file the charges your evidence already supports. Write your CHARGE blocks and close with the CASE line in your final message; further reads will not strengthen the case.
